title: stelis foetida
intro: Stelis foetida, a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Stelis foetida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to address various health concerns in traditional medicine.
